case_title: CACH LLC VS. CHRISTINA DIAZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC
DECLARATION OF ANGELICA MARTINEZ IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, CHRISTINA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, CHRISTINA $2,535.67 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,776.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED APR-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, CHRISTINA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, CHRISTINA DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2014
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, CHRISTINA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 15034266) FILED BY ATTORNEY VOS, RYAN E.
